name: MCP-Server-for-Smart-Bulb-With-Claude
description: This project creates an MCP server using Node.js and TypeScript to autonomously control a smart bulb via UDP communication. It integrates with AI interfaces like ChatGPT or Claude, enabling seamless, anonymous, and automated lighting control with color and brightness adjustments.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
